description: Poll VictoriaMetrics /api/v1/status/tsdb and emit a RunRequest (or warning SkipReason) when totalSeries crosses a threshold.

base_url_env_var.label: Base URL Env Var
base_url_env_var.description: Env var with VictoriaMetrics base URL.

threshold_series.label: Threshold (series)
threshold_series.description: Series count threshold. Cross this → RunRequest or warning SkipReason.

top_n_metrics.label: Top N Metrics
top_n_metrics.description: topN metrics by cardinality to surface in the sensor evaluation.

target_job_name.label: Target Job Name
target_job_name.description: Job to RunRequest against when threshold breached. None = SkipReason warning only.

request_timeout_seconds.label: Request Timeout Seconds
request_timeout_seconds.description: HTTP timeout for the cardinality poll.
